title: Surgeries - Tom Hayes Labour MP Bournemouth East
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Bournemouth East
text_excerpt: Surgeries - Tom Hayes Labour MP Bournemouth East Skip to content Home Survey News Surgeries About Me Get In Touch Meet me at my surgeries I hold regular in-person surgeries throughout the constituency and can also offer online appointments. These are opportunities to discuss the issues that matter to you, projects you would like me to know about, as well as how I might be able to help with your individual case. All surgeries are by appointment only for security reasons. My team can often help you in advance or instead of a surgery appointment to make the best use of your time. I can assure you that all correspondence with my team is completely confidential. Surgery appointment requests are reviewed every Monday. To request an appointment, please fill out the form below. First Name * Last Name * Address * Postcode * Email * Mobile What do you want to talk to me about? * 0 / 1200 Are you writing on behalf of someone else? * Yes, and I have their written permission to do so Yes, but I don't have their written permission to do so No Would you like to sign up for updates from Tom Hayes MP in the form of his newsletter? You can opt out at any time. Yes, add me to the list No, don't add me to the list Share Your Thoughts Please do not fill in this field. Alternatively, you can also get in touch with me by sending addressed mail to me at my parliamentary office at: Tom Hayes MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA. Please make sure to include: A brief summary of the issue you would like to talk to me about. Your full postal address (I can only assist people living in the Bournemouth East constituency). If you are writing on behalf of someone else, their written permission for you to act for them.
